name: amethyst-launcher
description: Amethyst desktop Minecraft launcher for Windows, macOS, and Linux.

scripts.check: node --check src/electron.js && node --check src/preload.js && node --check src/main.js && node --check src/server.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/launcher/accounts.js && node --check src/launcher/crashAnalyzer.js && node --check src/launcher/downloader.js && node --check src/launcher/downloadQueue.js && node --check src/launcher/javaLocator.js && node --check src/launcher/javaManager.js && node --check src/launcher/minecraft.js && node --check src/launcher/runtime.js && node --check src/launcher/discordRpc.js && node --check src/launcher/minecraftPaths.js && node --check src/launcher/mojangApi.js && node --check src/launcher/modLoaders.js && node --check src/launcher/modloader.js && node --check src/launcher/modpacks.js && node --check src/launcher/forgeInstaller.js && node --check src/launcher/skins.js && node --check src/launcher/microsoftAuth.js && node --check src/launcher/instances.js && node --check src/launcher/logs.js && node --check src/launcher/folders.js && node --check src/launcher/news.js && node --check src/launcher/os.js && node --check src/launcher/rules.js && node --check src/launcher/store.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check test/modpacks-auth.test.js && node --check test/mod-loading.test.js && node --check test/resourcepacks.test.js && node test/electron-packaging.test.js
scripts.test: npm run check && node test/rules.test.js && node test/features.test.js && node test/forge-skins.test.js && node test/modpacks-auth.test.js && node test/mod-loading.test.js && node test/modloader.test.js && node test/startup.test.js && node test/resourcepacks.test.js && node test/crashAnalyzer.test.js
